data.body: Completion evidence for AC1 (epic rollup) — ALL 16 children are closed. This is a ticket-store rollup that the file-based completion-verifier cannot query, but it is structurally enforced by rebar's open-children guard (the epic transition would be REJECTED if any child were open) and independently verified: rebar list-descendants 86ac-086a-20ad-4327 returns 15 tasks + 1 story (16 total), and iterating rebar show over each returns status=closed for all 16 (still-open count: 0). The closed children: c085, 0b96, ed13, 8bc5, 3275, 18e6, 3c07, 5062, 7931, 555e, c595, 1f77, 538c, 2f8e, 9a5a (the 15 tasks) + 121b (the story). Every child's code change is also LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 in Gerrit (changes #812-#835). The metrics command works end-to-end (rebar metrics --since --until --output json emits all registered metrics).
